meta.description: Structured Stable Diffusion prompts for all Berserkr game creatures and monsters
meta.art_style: Frank Miller Sin City meets Frank Frazetta 1970s fantasy art, HEAVY BLACK INK illustration style, extreme high contrast black and white with selective bold color accents
meta.negative_base: modern elements, anime, cartoon, cute, chibi, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame, photorealistic, 3D render, CGI
meta.source_data: berserkr-godot/data/creatures.json, npcs.json lorebook entries, locations.json, quests.json, gods.json

creatures.name: Wolf
creatures.positive_prompt: Frank Miller Sin City meets Frank Frazetta 1970s fantasy art, snarling northern wolf in deep snow, HEAVY BLACK INK illustration style, extreme high contrast black and white with selective bold color accents of amber yellow eyes, lean starving wolf baring fangs, ribs visible through mangy winter fur, hunched aggressive posture, ears flattened back, hackles raised along spine, frost clinging to muzzle, saliva dripping from exposed teeth, paw prints in deep snow, dark pine forest background, Fimbulwinter desperation in its eyes, pack hunter cornered and dangerous, heavy crosshatching on fur texture, deep black shadows consuming the treeline, moonlight catching the edge of fangs
creatures.negative_prompt: modern elements, anime, cartoon, cute, chibi, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame, photorealistic, 3D render, CGI, friendly dog, domesticated, colorful, bright daylight, happy expression, puppy
identity_features: lean starving frame with visible ribs
amber yellow eyes glinting in darkness
frost-crusted grey-brown fur
bared fangs with dripping saliva
hunched aggressive pack hunter posture
heavy paw prints in snow
suggested_poses: front view snarling with hackles raised
pack of three wolves emerging from dark treeline
mid-leap lunging at viewer with jaws open
crouching low in snow stalking prey
